h1.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, left-aligned, used for primary chapter or lab titles in the Table of Contents.

h2.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, indented with a leading number, used for specific tasks or sub-sections.
h2.example_text: 1. Record your phenotype and genotype for the following Mendelian traits:..

visual_matchers.pattern: Text followed by a series of leader dots (periods) and a right-aligned page number
Orange serif text in the top-left header
Red sans-serif text in the top-right header
Solid red horizontal rule spanning the page width

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Header content above the red line (Institution, Course ID) and centered numeric page markers at the bottom footer.
